name: Patti Smith
description: American singer, songwriter, author and poet (born 1946)
abstract: Patricia Lee Smith (born December 30, 1946) is an American singer, songwriter, poet, and author. Her 1975 debut album Horses made her an influential member of the New York City–based punk rock movement.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Maxwell
about_quotes.evidence: I've done a record with John Lennon and with this punk rock singer, what's her name? Patti Smith. On her last album.

about_quotes.speaker: Bernie Kirsh
about_quotes.evidence: I was interviewed to do an album for Patti Smith... I started doing the recording, and did it... Yeah I did, I did. That was 1975, fall of ’75 I think, October, somewhere in there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bernie Kirsh interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 27, 2022
